productDisplayName: Guess Women Mini Rock Candy Gold Watch
description: guess watches are all about durability and masterpieces rolled in one. They have proven themselves by epitomizing style and impeccable technology in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of watches are a fresh take on their eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 28 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel, crystal embellishments and a gold steel strap guess logo at the 12 hour mark Butterfly clasp with a mother of pearl dial and metallic numbers in metallic hands Polished hands mark sub dials Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters,allowing you to use it when washing hands or in mild rain
